description: Replace all hotyue/IP-Sentinel references with XingLingQAQ/IP-Sentinel, update AGENT_VERSION to 4.2.1, remove Agent Docker build from CI, delete core/Dockerfile, add heartbeat anomaly detection in webhook_master.py, and default-enable heartbeat in install.sh.
steps: 1. In version.txt, change AGENT_VERSION=4.2.0 to AGENT_VERSION=4.2.1
2. In core/install.sh line 64, change REPO_RAW_URL from hotyue to XingLingQAQ. Also line 1019 change the GitHub URL from hotyue to XingLingQAQ.
3. In core/agent_daemon.sh line 421, change the hardcoded repo_url from hotyue to XingLingQAQ.
4. In core/mod_trust.sh line 11, change REPO_RAW_URL from hotyue to XingLingQAQ.
5. In core/tg_report.sh line 200, change REPO_RAW_URL from hotyue to XingLingQAQ.
6. In core/updater.sh line 12, change REPO_RAW_URL from hotyue to XingLingQAQ.
7. In master/tg_master.sh line 12, change REPO_RAW_URL from hotyue to XingLingQAQ. Lines 276 and 278, change the GitHub button URLs from hotyue to XingLingQAQ.
8. In master/install_master.sh line 63, change REPO_RAW_URL from hotyue to XingLingQAQ. Line 412, change the GitHub URL from hotyue to XingLingQAQ.
9. In master/webhook_master.py line 40, change REPO_RAW_URL from hotyue to XingLingQAQ. Lines 536 and 543, change the GitHub button URLs from hotyue to XingLingQAQ.

10. In README.md: Replace ALL occurrences of hotyue/IP-Sentinel with XingLingQAQ/IP-Sentinel (license badge, curl commands for install_master.sh and install.sh in all 3 deployment modes, legacy branch URL, contributors image, starchart URLs). Keep the @xykt credit line as-is.

11. In .github/workflows/docker-publish.yml: Remove the 'Docker meta for Agent' step and the 'Build and Push Agent Image' step entirely. Also remove the AGENT_VERSION extraction from the 'Extract versions' step (it is no longer needed). Keep the trigger (v* tag push + workflow_dispatch) and only build/push the Master image.
12. Delete the file core/Dockerfile entirely (Agent Docker image is no longer built).

13. In master/webhook_master.py, in the handle_heartbeat() function, after the 'UPDATE nodes SET last_seen' DB call, add anomaly detection logic: parse load_avg from the JSON body (format '1min,5min,15min'), check if 1-minute load exceeds 10.0; parse uptime and check if it is less than 300 seconds (recent reboot). If any anomaly is detected and CHAT_ID is available (from header X-Chat-Id), call send_msg() to send an alert with the node name, alias, anomaly type, and current stats.

14. In core/install.sh, in the interactive setup section (after asking for TG_TOKEN/CHAT_ID but before writing config.conf), add a prompt asking for MASTER_WEBHOOK_URL (optional, for heartbeat reporting to the Master). If provided, write it to config.conf. The heartbeat timer is already enabled unconditionally via systemd (ip-sentinel-heartbeat.timer is already enabled at line ~770). The heartbeat.sh script already exits silently if MASTER_WEBHOOK_URL is empty, so simply adding the prompt and writing the value to config.conf is sufficient.
15. Verify docker-compose.yml does NOT reference any Agent image or service - it currently only has Master, which is correct. No changes needed to docker-compose.yml.
acceptance_criteria: grep -r 'hotyue/IP-Sentinel' on all non-.git files returns zero results
master/webhook_master.py handle_heartbeat() contains anomaly detection for high load and recent reboot
core/install.sh contains a prompt for MASTER_WEBHOOK_URL during interactive setup
